---
name: Maintenance Task
about: Report a maintenance or housekeeping task
title: "[MAINTENANCE] "
labels: maintenance, needs-triage
assignees: ''

---

**Task Description**
A clear and concise description of the maintenance task.

**Scope**
What parts of the project does this task affect? (e.g. dependencies, documentation, CI/CD)

**Impact**
What will be the result of completing this task? (e.g. improved performance, updated dependencies)

**Additional Context**
Add any other context or notes about the maintenance task here.
